field_rationales.product.image_url: Chosen Müller product-only front packshot because it shows the exact 800 ml XXL pump bottle from the accepted PDP on a clean light background; rejected 200 ml tube and Rose Water/Nutrient Blends images as wrong size/variant/market.

sources.evidence: Exact product-only front packshot of the gold NEQI Diamond Glass Conditioner tube showing the 250 ml / 8.5 fl oz label, with full product visible and no outer box, bundle, model, lifestyle scene, or retailer badge.

field_rationales.product.currency: The chosen dm.de PDP displays the price in EUR.
field_rationales.product.image_url: Kept the already accepted JohnBeerens direct CDN packshot because it is exact to NEQI Diamond Glass Conditioner 250 ml, product-only, front-facing, full product visible, high-resolution via Shopify width parameter, and cleaner for background removal than the lower-resolution dm rendered image.
field_rationales.product.price_eur: Stored 12.95 EUR from the chosen dm.de affiliate PDP, which displays the exact product price and current Lieferbar status.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: Removed the canonical brand and product line from the saleable title, leaving Conditioner.
field_rationales.product.category_key: Submitted category is conditioner; dm and NEQI describe a rinse-out Spuelung/Conditioner used after shampooing and rinsed after 2-3 minutes.
field_rationales.product.product_line: Diamond Glass is the stable NEQI product line shown on the official brand PDP, dm PDP, retailer PDP, and packaging.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: Selected the exact dm.de PDP because dm is the top purchase URL preference for conditioner, the page is a concrete product-detail page, it is exact to NEQI Diamond Glass Conditioner 250 ml, and it currently shows Lieferbar with cart capability. This beats the brand-direct PDP because dm is preferred for conditioner and beats JohnBeerens because dm is a preferred German retailer with available status.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: Set to available because the chosen dm.de PDP displays In den Warenkorb and Lieferbar with standard shipping information.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_specs: All three thickness rows are intentional: dm says the conditioner is suitable for all hair types, and the official NEQI PDP explicitly includes feines and dickes Haar; normal is included as the midpoint under the same all-hair-types claim. The moisture-need value snaps is based on intensive moisture, smoothness, anti-frizz, and hydration claims rather than a protein-repair positioning.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_conditioner_reran: Weight is medium because sources call the formula conditioning/rich but also light and non-weighing. Repair level is low because evidence supports cosmetic conditioning, detangling, shine, and frizz control rather than strong repair. Balance direction is moisture from Feuchtigkeit/hydration claims. Ingredient flags come from dimethicone/amodimethicone, juniper oil/C13-15 alkane, oat peptide/hydrolyzed Verbascum, glycerin/propylene glycol.

review.notes: Auto-approved after processed image and properties were both approved.

sources.evidence: Retailer PDP confirms Bali Curls Bonding Repair Leave-In Creme, 150 ml, article number 76228369, GTIN 4262391991732, in-stock status, cream format, styling-base positioning, damaged/curly hair fit, light-care description, and a clean product-only packshot URL.

field_rationales.product.currency: Official brand-direct PDP price is displayed in EUR.
field_rationales.product.image_url: Chosen Haar-Shop product-only packshot because it depicts the exact Bali Curls Bonding Repair Leave-In Creme 150 ml tube on a clean light/white background, without box, bundle, lifestyle scene, badges, or sale overlays. Official Shopify alternatives were exact but had decorative grey brand shapes or mood/text compositions.
field_rationales.product.price_eur: Official brand-direct PDP used as affiliate_link shows 13,90 EUR and an in-stock/add-to-cart state.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: Official PDP title is BONDING REPAIR LEAVE-IN CREAM N°3; after removing brand and line, the DB-ready clean name is Leave-In Cream N°3.
field_rationales.product.category_key: Submitted category is leave_in, and official use instructions describe a no-rinse cream applied to damp hair after washing.
field_rationales.product.product_line: Official and retailer titles consistently use Bonding Repair as the product family/line.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: Mandatory preferred-host searches across dm.de, rossmann.de, mueller.de, douglas.de, hagel-shop.de, flaconi.de, notino.de, otto.de, and amazon.de found no acceptable German preferred-retailer PDP. For leave_in, brand-direct is next after dm and beats lower-priority/international sources because the official Bali Care PDP is exact, purchasable, and in stock.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: Used resolved_brand.canonical_brand exactly from the prompt: Bali Curls.
field_rationales.product.price_checked_at: Checked during this rework run on 2026-07-05T23:50:00+02:00.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: Official PDP states the item is in stock and provides an add-to-cart action.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_checked_at: Checked during this rework run on 2026-07-05T23:50:00+02:00.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_specs: Format cream, roles, towel-dry application, repair/moisture/detangling/anti-frizz/curl-definition benefits, protein/humectant/polymer flags, and silicone exclusion are based on official PDP copy and INCI. Weight remains light because the official PDP calls it a light daily care booster without build-up or greasy residue, the visible label says Lightweight-Creme, and Haar-Shop describes it as light care. provides_heat_protection is corrected to false because Chaarlie treats heat protection as device/pre-heat styling protection; sources only make a broad marketing claim about protection from external heat, with no device-use instruction or max temperature.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_fit_spec: Light booster-only fit reflects a leave-in styling-base/care-booster, not a rinse-out conditioner replacement. Benefits are limited to curl_definition, repair, and detangle_smooth; heat_protect is removed because no approval-safe device heat-protection evidence exists.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_leave_in_eligibil: Eligibility is conservative for damaged/curly/wavy hair and lightweight no-build-up positioning. Fine and normal thickness get repair/non-heat styling; normal also gets curl-definition air-dry fit; coarse gets moisture_anti_frizz/non-heat styling because the product is lightweight rather than rich. No heat_style rows are emitted.

review.notes: Auto-approved after processed image and properties were both approved.
